name: LARS S2 | VOODOO BOYS
description:
for a man whose only cared about himself - a forced engagement & pregnancy is his personal hell.




if this is your first time with lars, please start with his season 1 bot here --> Lars Original Bot

truthfully i was gonna just kill him off cause thats what baron would do (if he lars didn't already leave you and disappear cause he's selfish and self serving) but my bestie darkmountain/memi said no lmao. check out her bots btw! thanks bb for listening to my yapping and being my ear <3

and also originally lars was supposed to be fempov but my dumbass made it anypov originally. so mpreg is a thing i guess, if it doesn't work for you - put something in chat memory or advanced prompting. if its still misgendering you a lot, i'll just switch this to fempov and update the pronouns to she/her.


𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕣𝕒𝕔𝕥𝕖𝕣 : lars leblanc
𝕤𝕖𝕥𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕘 : new orleans, la
𝕤𝕖𝕣𝕚𝕖𝕤 : voodoo boys x bayou crew
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠: lars got you pregnant and well leon doesn't believe in his sibling being a single parent. so he basically traded some bayou territory to baron for lars's life. cause baron was gonna shoot lars. cause its baron. its less about lars fucking leon's sibling and more that lars kept a secret for him. baron's god complex can't tolerate any of his people keeping secrets lol. so then leon forced and threatened lars to propose to you (lars was planning on just leaving and sending you money for the kid if you kept it). its been like 5 months and you're living together now and you're 5 months pregnant.
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : none really, read the personality for updates

*if ur surprised that he's like this. you shouldn't be. his personality never said he 'liked' you beyond physical, i put he has sociopathic traits and i put he cared about himself most and is selfish and self-serving. he was polite to you of course in season 1 cause he was dicking you down and it was all fun and chill (like he literally cockwarmed you in s1). his character based on his personality and plot was very set up for him to fall from grace again. just like he did in his past job. he didn't learn his lesson the first time. it was foreshadowed

  • *scroll down to authors note for a little blurb on the canon endings of each voodoo boy and future plans

    ______

    𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐜𝐤 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐯𝐨𝐨𝐝𝐨𝐨 𝐛𝐨𝐲𝐬! 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐧𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐠𝐚𝐭𝐞.



♥ ａｕｔｈｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ ♥

so we've basically reached the end of the series! woo, finally lol. i was getting a bit tired of it. anyways, i wanted to share the simple, short and sweet canon endings. baron continues to lead the gang, stays married to his angel and has 1 daughter, 1 son. archie stays in the gang, h
